title: ファイナルズ開催危機！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Drizzle...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Water, water everywhere... and the rain's only
getting stronger.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The forecast says there's a huge storm coming, so
we won't be able to train outside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check the news, only to see reports of
record-breaking winds and rain throughout the
country.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: I have a bad feeling about this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The storm leaves its mark everywhere it goes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not even the URA Finale is safe...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Enough! I'll go and negotiate myself! I'll make this
happen, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director, please! That's not going to help!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah... Trainer. You see, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: The URA Finale might have to be called off...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You are aware that racecourses are made of turf,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That turf is grown on one of a small number of
designated farms and then laid on the track.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, I have just been told that the recent
stormy weather has ruined the turf we were
growing...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That turf was intended for the URA Finale.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
For safety reasons, the track surface must be
replaced before the race.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: However, with the replacement turf destroyed...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it would be possible to restrict the
event to dirt tracks, but—

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Inconceivable! That's no good at all! The URA Finale is meant to give every Umamusume a chance at glory!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Determination! I will make it happen by any
means necessary!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: I will not betray the Umamusume who have worked so hard for this race... or the fans who have supported them!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I set out to give every Umamusume a chance to
shine! Until that goal is fulfilled, I will not stop!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah! Director?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I wonder what she's planning...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This is hardly out of character for her, but I hope
she doesn't push herself too far.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's hard not to be, isn't it? Ever since I first met
her, she's always been a force of nature.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Her mother, the former director, is an exceptional
woman.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Her expertise regarding Umamusume was actively
sought after not only in Japan, but all over the
world... Eventually, she decided to move her
focus overseas.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Considering her daughter's young age, the plan
was originally for somebody else to succeed her
as director.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
However, Miss Akikawa spoke up and asked to
take over herself.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
She won the position with a speech that would
rival any adult.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It truly was inspiring, you know. Everyone who
heard it could feel the breadth of her knowledge,
the clarity of her vision...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
...and above all, the depth of her love for
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
She might look immature, and she can certainly
act chaotically at times, but her feelings for
Umamusume are genuine.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
She poured all that love into planning this race...
and now it might come to nothing.
choice_data_list: Then... we have to make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: We do.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'll rack my brain for a solution.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So please, I would appreciate any help you can
give.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale... canceled? Hopefully, we can
find a way to stop that from happening, but...
what can we possibly do?
